home.heroSubtext: Plan your layout in 2D, balance your budget in VND, optimize color harmony, and shop the cheapest deals across Shopee, Lazada, and Tiki.
home.featureLayoutDesc: Set custom room dimensions. Position desks, chairs, monitors, and decor interactively on our drag-and-drop canvas.
home.featureStyleDesc: Get real-time style scores. Let our engine evaluate how consistent your setup is with Minimalist, RGB, or wood aesthetics.
home.featurePriceDesc: Compare actual listings in Vietnam. Save money with auto-updates and affiliate deals mapped directly to your parts list.
home.themesSubtext: Select a theme to auto-fill your planner layout instantly.

community.title: Community Gallery
community.description: Browse {count} desk setups shared by the community. Get inspired and make it yours.
community.noSetupsSubtext: Be the first to share your setup!

planner.title: Planner
planner.addItems: Browse components to add to your setup

visualize.title: AI Room Visualizer
visualize.emptyState: Describe a room and let AI generate a visualization of your setup.

themes.title: Theme Gallery
themes.description: Choose a curated theme to inspire your next setup.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noFavoritesSubtext: Browse components and click the heart icon to save them.
